arts.ttl: Ipswich clarify Kalvin Phillips loan deal amid Man City recall talk
arts.sum: A serious injury to Rodri has sparked speculation that Phillips could be recalled from his loan at Portman Road, but he looks set to stay with the Tractor Boys

arts.ttl: Ipswich Town: McKenna hopeful Man City don't recall Kalvin Phillips
arts.oTtl: East Anglican Daily Times - Ispwich Town FC
arts.sum: Asked if the 28-year-old was available for Sunday’s game against Aston Villa at Portman Road, McKenna said: “Kalvin has trained with the group today, so we’ll make a judgement on how many minutes he’ll be available for.” Phillips started Town’s Premier League games against Fulham and Brighton, but sat out last weekend’s 1-1 draw at Southampton with a minor thigh injury sustained in training.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa boss Unai Emery makes Man Utd and Bayern Munich promise
arts.sum: Aston Villa have two blockbuster home fixtures to look forward to next week against Bayern Munich and Manchester United, but Unai Emery insists his full focus will only ever be on the next match, which is against Ipswich Town this Sunday (2pm). Asked what he expects from Ipswich, Emery said: "They are playing really well.
